title: Dark Night of the Soul
description: John of the Cross on the soul's purification through darkness: God strips away all consolation so the soul can receive pure light.
introduction: John of the Cross on the soul's purification through darkness: God strips away all consolation so the soul can receive pure light.

translation.text: On a dark night, kindled in love with yearnings — oh, happy chance! — I went forth without being observed, my house being now at rest.
